name: How much money can I get for slipping on wet floor at work?

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for slipping on wet floor at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66-72% lost wages, full meds, disability pay—depends on injury/salary.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp payouts cover 66-72% of average weekly wages, medical bills, and permanent disability ratings—no pain and suffering.** Amounts vary by injury severity and your pay in Utah/Idaho.[1] Key factors: (1) Temp total disability: up to 312 weeks; (2) Max weekly benefit ~$1,000+; (3) Settlements via compromise clause. Use an attorney to value impairment accurately. Factors like pre-existing conditions reduce awards.
